query:
DELETE m1 FROM messages m1
INNER JOIN messages m2
ON m1.messageId = m2.messageId 
AND m1.sessionId = m2.sessionId 
AND m1.id > m2.id
WHERE m1.messageId IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute DELETE m1 FROM messages m1
INNER JOIN messages m2
ON m1.messageId = m2.messageId 
AND m1.sessionId = m2.sessionId 
AND m1.id > m2.id
WHERE m1.messageId IS NOT NULL;
